clips.note: massed party formation — the fight inside the party
officials at a desk — Hanover conference
party HQ interior with standards — Bamberg conference
figures at a rostrum — Strasser/Goebbels steamrolled
street scene — consoling Strasser at the station
young SA men in profile — devotion to the Fuehrer
crowd with raised arms — the 1928 ballot box
factory smokestacks — courting the men with money
officers with flags — the army officer corps reacts
Hitler saluting, then turning away — leaving early, contemptuous
crowd surging in the street — Harzburg Front collapses into infighting
lone figure saluting — Hitler emerges the winner
cavalry riding — no organized force left to defend democracy
ranks on the move — seizing the party machinery / loyalty oath
figures conferring at a rostrum — Hitler's private hour with Oskar
